components.text: Essence, Breath, Spirit. I heard these terms from a dying cultivator I found collapsed at the edge of a forest. He looked at me and said I was imbalanced, then laughed.

I did not find it funny at the time. Eight months later my Qi nearly tore through my ribs because I had been feeding one pillar and ignoring the other two.
Tend to all three equally. The body does not forgive imbalance quietly.
